ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in progress, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary producer for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project */,
  "client_requirements" TEXT /* Specific requirements or notes from the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the asset belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., MP4, WAV) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "original_file_name" TEXT /* Original file name before any system renaming */,
  "upload_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the asset */,
  "license_info" TEXT /* Licensing information for the asset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clips" (
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clip */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the clip belongs to */,
  "clip_name" TEXT /* Name of the clip */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the clip */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the clip */,
  "subtitle" TEXT /* Subtitle of the clip */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the clip */,
  "scene_number" INTEGER /* Scene number of the clip */,
  "take_number" INTEGER /* Take number of the clip */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the clip was recorded */,
  "camera_id" INTEGER /* ID of the camera used to record the clip */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the clip */,
  "frame_rate" TEXT /* Frame rate of the clip */,
  "audio_channels" INTEGER /* Number of audio channels */,
  "audio_sample_rate" INTEGER /* Audio sample rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clips_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edls" (
  "edl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EDL */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the EDL belongs to */,
  "edl_name" TEXT /* Name of the EDL */,
  "edl_file" TEXT /* File path to the EDL file */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the EDL */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date of the EDL */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the EDL */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the EDL (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edls_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edls_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edl_clips" (
  "edl_id" INTEGER /* ID of the EDL */,
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clip */,
  "record_in" TEXT /* Record in time of the clip in the EDL */,
  "record_out" TEXT /* Record out time of the clip in the EDL */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the clip in the EDL */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the EDL-clip relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edl_id", "clip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., editor, producer, director) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the project */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicator if the comment has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the revision belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the revision belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "approved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the revision */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was approved */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the revision was not approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_approved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the deliverable belongs to */,
  "deliverable_name" TEXT /* Name of the deliverable */,
  "deliverable_file" TEXT /* File path to the deliverable file */,
  "client_review_date" TEXT /* Date the client reviewed the deliverable */,
  "client_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the client */,
  "final_approval_date" TEXT /* Date the deliverable was finally approved */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the deliverable file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the deliverable file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliverables_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
